summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.services; import org.json.JSONObject; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.model.orchestration.AIProvider; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.model.orchestration.Orchestrator; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.log.Log; public class FeedbackService { private static FeedbackService instance; public static synchronized FeedbackService getInstance() { if (instance == null) { instance = new FeedbackService(); } return instance; } public void recordFeedback(Orchestrator orchestrator, String category, int rating) { if (orchestrator == null) return; String remoteModel = orchestrator.getRemoteModel(); if (remoteModel == null || remoteModel.isEmpty()) return; orchestrator.getAiProviders().stream() .filter(p -> remoteModel.equals(p.getName())) .findFirst()
